commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No separate repair job is needed; this automerge-opted PR has no blocking review findings and should proceed through the existing check and merge gates.; Cleared: Cleared: the diff adds no supply-chain surface and narrows a command-authority-sensitive Telegram debounce bypass to authorized abort controls. (sha=70c0ca45daa304bb0c5bc6dce120fa3fb88e7f90)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Telegram inbound debounce bypass depend on an authorized abort-control message and strengthens the unauthorized group stop debounce test.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main gives any abort-looking Telegram text a null debounce key, and the debounce helper immediately flushes null-key work. The strengthened middleware test on this branch is the focused reproduction path, but I did not execute it in the read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: No separate repair job is needed; this automerge-opted PR has no blocking review findings and should proceed through the existing check and merge gates.
